Wolf Freedom of Religion or Belief Victims List Country Profiles Defending Freedoms Project Publications " class="we-megamenu-nolink"> Annual Reports Contact Us Facebook Twitter YouTube Instagram Search Azerbaijan ANNUAL REPORT: AZERBAIJAN CHAPTERS Recent News Events Publications Advising Government Religious freedom conditions in Azerbaijan are poor. Authorities detain Shi’a Muslims whose religious practice falls outside the government's preferred interpretation of Islam, and they reportedly subject detainees to mistreatment. Azerbaijan’s religion law mandates strict state oversight of religious practice. Ongoing repression of independent civil society limits reporting on religious freedom violations, and historic Armenian religious sites in Nagorno-Karabakh remain at risk of destruction.
